title: Fix Download plans modal — options now trigger export
description:
PipeSync "Download plans" modal (right-click a plan in the PDF explorer) showed three export options but clicking any of them did nothing.

Root cause: the modal buttons used data-action="plan-download-plans-run" but no click handler was registered in app.js (or the modular plan-view-data-actions handler). The modal opened correctly with fileId in state, but clicks were ignored.

Fix: wire plan-download-plans-run to planBoardDownloadLegacyPlanWholePdf(docId, mode) for original, highlights-flat, and highlights-editable. Modal closes immediately on click (same pattern as Build map and other plan modals).

Hard-refresh PipeSync after deploy (Ctrl+Shift+R).

Who is affected: Private OVH server. SaaS unchanged until you publish a platform release.
changeLog: Fix Download plans modal — all three export options now start download.
Modal auto-closes on option click (matches other plan modals).
Add plan-download-plans-run handler in app.js and plan-view-data-actions.js.
Cache bust dbg37 for app.js, pipesync-boot.js, and pdf-highlight-shape.
